---
title: "TRSE units: AMIGA"
description: Bundled Turbo Rascal unit files (.tru) shipped with TRSE
---

# AMIGA

These paths are relative to `units/AMIGA/` in the TRSE tree. Reference a unit with `@use "<path>"` (no `.tru` extension).

## Files

- `demounit`
- `gfx/tiles`
- `graphics`
- `lsplayer`
- `players/ptplayer`
- `sprites`
- `system/keys`
- `text/text`
